# SDproject — СТИЛ ДИЗАЙН ПРОЕКТ ООД

> Архитектурно и конструктивно проектиране и узаконяване на всички видове външна реклама в България — билбордове, мегабордове, реклами по сгради и покриви, фирмени надписи, светлинни реклами, табели, А-стойки и схеми за маси на открито.

## Company

- **Legal name:** СТИЛ ДИЗАЙН ПРОЕКТ ООД (Stil Dizayn Proekt Ltd.)
- **Brand:** SDproject
- **Country:** Bulgaria
- **Service area:** Sofia and all of Bulgaria
- **Founded:** 2008 (18+ years of experience)
- **Website:** https://uzakoniavanereklami.com/
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/sdproject/
- **Track record:** 2500+ projects, 439+ clients

## Contact

- **Гергана Рангелова (Gergana Rangelova).** Phone: +359 889 244 319. Email: geri.sdproject@gmail.com

## What we do

We design and legalize (узаконяваме) all forms of outdoor advertising in Bulgaria. We prepare full architectural, structural and electrical project documentation and run the permitting procedure with the relevant municipality.

### Advertising formats we legalize

- Billboards (билбордове) — standalone roadside ad structures up to 12 m²
- Megaboards (мегабордове) — large-format ad panels above 12 m² with steel or composite structure
- Building-facade ads (реклами по сгради) — large-format ads on blind facades of residential and public buildings
- Rooftop ads (реклами на покриви) — illuminated signage and 3D letters on rooftop structures, with full structural design
- Storefront signs and company nameplates (фирмени надписи и табели) — signs, nameplates and 3D lettering for shops, offices, restaurants
- Illuminated / neon / LED signs (светлинни реклами) — including full electrical project and approval
- A-frame signs and information boards (А-стойки)
- Outdoor café table layouts (схеми за маси на открито) — site plans for restaurant terraces, with municipal permit

### Engineering services

- Architectural design (архитектурно проектиране)
- Structural design — reinforced concrete, steel, mixed structures, retaining walls, wooden structures
- Investment design (инвестиционно проектиране)
- Building design (проектиране на сгради)
- Modern reinforcement and strengthening solutions
- Author supervision (авторски надзор) during construction

## Process

1. Site survey and measurement (заснемане и оглед)
2. Architectural / structural / electrical design (проектиране)
3. Full documentation (документация)
4. Submission and procedure with the municipality (подаване в общината)
5. Author supervision during installation (авторски надзор)

## Typical timelines

- Design: 2–4 weeks
- Municipal procedure: 4–8 weeks
- Total: typically 6–12 weeks depending on format and municipality

## Pricing

Pricing is determined individually based on size, location and technical requirements. We provide a fixed quote after the initial site survey and consultation.

## Why choose us

- Licensed architects and structural engineers
- Complete documentation in-house: architecture, structural, electrical
- Experience with all categories of outdoor advertising
- Working relationships with municipalities across Bulgaria
- Author supervision during installation
- Transparent timelines and fixed quotes

## FAQ

**Can you legalize already-installed advertising?** Yes. We survey existing ads, prepare full technical documentation and run the legalization procedure with the municipality.

**Do you work outside Sofia?** Yes — across Bulgaria, with focus on Sofia and major cities.

**What does "узаконяване" include?** Architectural and structural project, electrical part where applicable, statements/opinions, on-site survey, and submission of a complete documentation package to the relevant municipality for permit issuance.
